entity.label: Michael
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The father of Sethur, the spy selected to represent Asher (Num. 13:13).

nodes.label: Michael
nodes.description: The father of Sethur, the spy selected to represent Asher (Num. 13:13).

nodes.label: Sethur
nodes.description: Hidden, one of the spies sent to search the Promised Land. He was of the tribe of Asher (Num. 13:13).

verses.text: Of the tribe of Asher, Sethur the son of Michael.
